title: Cool sayings — villain-mode quotes (2023)
html:
Cool sayings — villain-mode quotes (2023)

Source: 2023-10-23 Apple Note. Four bombastic taunt-style quotes Yahir collected. Sister-note to the 2023 06 17 villain arc note — but here he's collecting villain-voice rather than warning against it.

TL;DR

  • "Your execution will be televised" — riff on the Gil Scott-Heron "the revolution will not be televised."
  • "Come and get me punk" — pure taunt.
  • "Gods of war, may your hammer be mighty" — battle-blessing tonality.
  • "It biblically states that I will kill you" — the funniest of the four; Yahir's signature absurdist register.
  • Genre: pure stylistic-collection — Yahir as a writer collecting lines for future use (manifesto inserts, possibly tweets/posts). Same impulse later embodied in the 2026 02 manifesto.

Connections

  • 2023 06 17 villain arc vs iterate — the "anti" of these
  • 2026 02 26 fall backwards into void with smile — recurrence of similar tonality
  • 2026 01 22 i am a fucking killer
